Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement On Behalf Of Tyrone Barber Construction Per Ccp Section 664.6
Off Calendar Aug-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TYRONE BARBER CONSTRUCTION'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT.
Appearances: Ryan K.J. Mau of Fotouhi Epps Hillger Gilroy (362.9300) for defendant and moving party; Phuong Nguyen (no card provided) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona.
Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: motion to enforce the settlement agreement is granted. Plaintiff's former counsel is directed to remit the $15,600 to defendant's counsel's trust account pursuant to the settlement agreement. Defendant is dismissed with prejudice pursuant to the settlement agreement. Defendant's request for attorney fees is denied. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of The Ex Parte Good Faith Settlement Order
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Text Ruling

Appearances: Phuong Nguyen (no card provided) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona; Ryan K.J. Mau of Fotouhi Epps Hillger Gilroy (362.9300) for defendant and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: plaintiff's motion for reconsideration of the ex parte good faith settlement order is denied. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
